rationale: The citing paper explicitly states it extends prior online advertising work and moves beyond single-channel studies, while the cited paper is a classic single-channel study estimating banner advertising effects on actual Internet purchasing with individual-level data. This topical and methodological proximity makes the cited work a plausible foundational/comparison source rather than an incidental mention. The DOI match is exact (10.1509/jmkr.43.1.98), so this pair should be retained for full relation assessment.
